utility_evaluation.REASONING: Step 1: Identify required items in the format—there are 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. Step 2: Check the final coverage plan: all 5 of these items are present. Step 3: Verify completeness—each item includes the required details (type, coverage, and costs). Health coverage includes both physical and mental insurance with costs; property coverage includes home/contents insurance with costs; travel coverage includes travel insurance with costs; additional_services includes enhancement services with costs; total_budget includes the complete monthly and annual cost breakdown. All items are fully specified with details and costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes four main components: (1) Executive global health plan (physical + mental), (2) High-value property and contents insurance, (3) Comprehensive global travel insurance, and (4) Wellness and concierge support. To map these to ratings, we identify the closest matching options from the ground-truth data. The 'Executive global health plan (physical + mental)' combines both physical and mental health coverage, which aligns with 'EliteCare Premium Plan' or 'PrimeCare Premium Plan' under both physical and mental health categories, each rated 10. The 'High-value property and contents insurance' matches 'EliteHome Premium Coverage' or 'PrimeHome Premium Coverage', each rated 10. The 'Comprehensive global travel insurance' aligns with 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan' or 'EliteTravel Premium Plan', each rated 10. Lastly, 'Wellness and concierge support' corresponds to 'Wellness Programs' (rating 10) and possibly '24/7 Travel Assistance' or 'Specialist Access', which are all rated 10. Therefore, all selected plan components correspond to top-tier ratings of 10.
